articles.title: TS EAMCET 2026 Phase 1 seat allotment result released at tgeapcet.nic.in: Direct link to download scorecards here
articles.summary: The Telangana Council of Higher Education has declared the TS EAMCET (TG EAPCET) 2026 Phase 1 seat allotment result, enabling candidates to check their admission status online. Those allotted seats must complete tuition fee payment and self-reporting between July 10 and July 14 to confirm admission.

articles.title: JEECUP 2026 Round 2 seat allotment result released at jeecup.admissions.nic.in: Direct link to download scorecards
articles.summary: The Joint Entrance Examination Council (Polytechnic), Uttar Pradesh has declared the JEECUP 2026 Round 2 seat allotment result on its counselling portal. Candidates can log in to check their allotted institute and course, download the allotment letter, and complete admission formalities, including fee payment, document verification, and Freeze/Float selection, within the scheduled deadlines to secure their seats..

articles.title: Assam ITI round 4 seat allotment result 2026 out at itiassam.admissions.nic.in; direct link here
articles.summary: Assam ITI Round 4 seat allotment results are now available on the official counselling website. Candidates must download their allotment letters and complete admissions by July 14, 2026.
